stemHtml: You are flying in the mountains. Which error will occur with your altimeter due to the Venturi effect?

options.a: The altimeter overreads. The wider the valley, the greater the error.
options.b: The aircraft is higher than indicated. The effect decreases with decreasing wind speed.
options.c: The altimeter overreads. The higher the wind speed, the greater the error.
options.d: If you are flying with a tailwind, the altimeter underreads; if you are flying with a headwind, it overreads.
